personal.name: Md Asif Jawed
personal.availability: Md Asif Jawed • Available for new opportunities
personal.description: Building scalable backend systems, distributed architectures, and production-grade SaaS products.

experience.description: Architected and scaled core backend payment infrastructures and real-time gaming services.
bullets: Spearheaded the migration of legacy monolithic architecture to highly scalable, event-driven microservices using Node.js and AWS.
Engineered robust payment gateway integrations and core wallet systems, successfully processing millions of high-concurrency transactions securely.
Optimized real-time gaming services, reducing websocket latency by 40% to ensure seamless player experiences during peak traffic.

experience.description: Developed and maintained highly performant APIs for diverse SaaS and Web3 applications.
bullets: Designed and implemented high-performance RESTful APIs for multiple enterprise SaaS platforms, decreasing average response times by 30%.
Optimized complex PostgreSQL database queries and implemented caching layers using Redis, drastically reducing database load.
Integrated Web3 capabilities and smart contract interactions for blockchain-centric client projects, ensuring robust security standards.

projects.title: TarbiyahOS
projects.description: A comprehensive SaaS platform designed to streamline educational operations, engineered for high velocity, scalability, and optimal performance.
bullets: Architected a strict multi-tenant data isolation strategy using PostgreSQL Row Level Security (RLS) via Supabase.
Leveraged Next.js App Router and React Server Components to reduce client-side JS bundles by 60%, achieving near-instant Time To Interactive.
Implemented real-time data sync using PostgreSQL triggers and designed a seamless Single Sign-On (SSO) authentication workflow.
